pkgmetadata.longdescription: Developer tools shipped alongside MAME upstream: chdman for CHD (Compressed Hunks of Data) image manipulation, plus romcmp, jedutil, floptool, imgtool, castool, ldresample, ldverify, nltool, nlwav, pngcmp, regrep, srcclean, testkeys, unidasm, and mame-split. This ebuild builds only the tools (EMULATOR=0), skipping the multi-hour emulator compile and its Qt/OpenGL dependency tree.
